strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform, demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Active engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product depth — only recent exposure at current role, no recognized AI products or publications
No evidence of director-level IC influence, advising strategic customers, or cloud platform strategy at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and recognized products
15 years engineering breadth with entrepreneurial track record
Cloud platform strategy and director-level IC experience

response.justification: The role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate meets the 15-year experience bar and shows entrepreneurial traits via GISCollective, plus recent MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq. However, AI exposure is shallow and recent (under a year), with no demonstrated AI products, publications, or platform-scale strategy work. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz rather than cloud platform design. No evidence of advising strategic customers or operating at director-level influence.
